## Contact
About Work with me Contact About Work with me Contact Let’s Talk Find Me 2A Orchard Road, Clondalkin, Dublin 22   Back to Top FIND ME 2A Orchard Road, Clondalkin, Dublin 22 Stay in touch maria@mariachapman. ie +353 85 711 8074.

Let’s Talk     MY PROCESS REALITY CHECK A deeper understanding of where you are currently at and what your real challenges are DISCOVERY Explore not just what you want but also what your needs are PLAN In collaboration we mould a bespoke plan and a strategy for you to move towards your goal MAKE IT HAPPEN Implement your plan while you are supported in working through challenges and roadblocks SUPPORT Continuous support - making changes and maintaining momentum can take time Is this what you are looking for.

Feeling overwhelmed, frustrated or unfulfilled daily in your job. Wrestling with procrastination and motivation. Struggling with self-doubt and confidence. Scrambling with finding focus but lack direction. Lacking meaning and purpose in your life and career. Experiencing change in your life or career and you need support navigating the transition.

We work together on both because they have a real impact on each other. I can support you to get clear on what you want, set direction and make sustainable changes personally and professionally. Through focused one to one sessions and in between session support you can look forward to a more balanced and meaningful life and career. Let's Talk Does this sound familiar. Are you…. Stuck in a rut in your career but don’t know where to start.

ie +353 85 711 8074

## Work with me
About Work with me Contact About Work with me Contact   One to one career coaching IF YOU FIND YOURSELF FEELING STUCK IN YOUR CAREER, LOOKING FOR FULFILLMENT OR OUT OF TOUCH WITH YOURSELF, YOU’RE IN THE RIGHT PLACE.     I am passionate about helping you move beyond feeling stuck and overwhelmed in your life and career. The people I usually work with don’t just want a career shift, they also want something to change in their lives.

My approach includes a compassionate and holistic blend of psychological methods and personal development insights. If you find yourself feeling stuck in your career, looking for fulfillment or out of touch with yourself , then you’re in the right place. Back to Top FIND ME 2A Orchard Road, Clondalkin, Dublin 22 Stay in touch maria@mariachapman.

Fast forward to 2019 I made a deliberate career shift to recalibrate my life and I established my own coaching practice. I have always been massively interested in people, what motivates us and how we work. My focus as a coach lies in supporting individuals experiencing the weight of overwork, unfulfillment and a sense of disconnection from themselves. I am passionate about supporting clients to find themselves again and bring balance and joy back into their lives and careers.

Thank you. Back to Top FIND ME 2A Orchard Road, Clondalkin, Dublin 22 Stay in touch maria@mariachapman. ie +353 85 711 8074

## About
About Work with me Contact About Work with me Contact Let's Talk Hi, I’m Maria A Cork girl, living in Dublin and mom to 3 smallies. I bring 15 years’ corporate leadership experience to my coaching practice and in 2010 I obtained my qualifications as a life and career coach.

I sincerely recommend her to anyone who wants to move aspects of their life forward – Alan ” my process reality check A deeper understanding of where you are currently at and what your real challenges are Discovery Explore not just what you want but also what your needs are Plan In collaboration we mould a bespoke plan and a strategy for you to move towards your goal Make it happen Implement your plan while you are supported in working through challenges and roadblocks support Continuous support - making changes and maintaining momentum can take time Learn more Newsletter Sign up with your email address to receive life and career tips Email Address Sign Up We respect your privacy.

Let's Talk wHAT MY CLIENTS SAY “ I worked with Maria for the last two years and can’t emphasise enough just how useful our conversations were in helping me to refocus on my goals, consider pathways forward, and to take action. Maria provides support and challenge in a way that is understanding, insightful, and empathic.

Stuck in a rut in your career but don’t know where to start. Feeling overwhelmed, frustrated or unfulfilled daily in your job. Wrestling with procrastination, self-doubt or lack of direction and motivation. Is something changing in your life or career and you need support navigating the transition. Are you seeking meaning and purpose in your life and career.

The people I usually work with don’t just want a career shift, they also want something to change in their lives. We work together on both because they have a real impact on each other. I can support you to get clear on what you want, set direction and make sustainable changes personally and professionally. Through focused one to one sessions and in between session support you can look forward to a more balanced and meaningful life and career. Am I the right coach for you. Are you….
